Home › About

About DPS & Co, Chartered Accountants

DPS & Co is a Mumbai-based Chartered Accountancy firm in practice since 2016, offering tax, audit, assurance, and advisory services to businesses and individuals.

The firm is a multi-disciplinary practice with partners and a team of qualified professionals across direct tax, indirect tax (GST), audit and assurance, company law, litigation support, and advisory. The founding partner has over 39 years of professional experience. We work with clients across a range of sectors in Mumbai, Thane, and Navi Mumbai.

Our partners

CA Dhirendra Sangoi

Founding & Managing Partner · Chartered Accountant (ICAI) · 39+ years in practice

Specialisation: Assurance, tax & advisory

CA Shreyas Sangoi

Partner · Chartered Accountant (ICAI) · Accredited GST Trainer (NACIN)

Specialisation: Indirect tax (GST)

CA Vishesh Sangoi

Partner · Chartered Accountant (ICAI)

Specialisation: Direct tax & advisory

CA Nilesh Gada

Partner · Chartered Accountant (ICAI) · 21+ years with the firm

Specialisation: Audit & assurance

CA Mittal Gala

Partner & Operations Head · Chartered Accountant (ICAI) · with the firm since 2007

Specialisation: Operations & compliance

ICAI membership numbers can be added to each partner profile where required.

Areas of specialisation

  • Direct taxation and income tax
  • Indirect taxation (GST)
  • Statutory, tax and internal audit
  • Company law and incorporation
  • Business and transaction advisory
